title: Consistency Rule Explained (2026): Why Your Best Days Can Lock Out Your Best Months
description: A canonical 2026 explainer of how prop-firm consistency rules actually work — what the threshold means, when it dies (or doesn't) at the funded gate, and why one $5K day can blow a $9K month at three of the seven major firms.

og.title: Consistency Rule Explained: Why Your Best Days Can Lock Out Your Best Months
og.description: The mechanic-level explainer of prop-firm consistency rules: thresholds, lifecycle scope, and where Topstep, Apex 4.0, MFFU, TPT, Tradeify, Bulenox, and Earn2Trade each draw the line.
